# Commercial Licensing

AIGENIE is available under AGPL-3.0-or-later for open-source use.

Organizations seeking to use AIGENIE, modified versions of AIGENIE, or derivative implementations in proprietary, closed-source, SaaS, enterprise, or production environments may request a separate commercial license.

Commercial licensing may include:

- proprietary deployment rights;
- integration support;
- validation and scientific advisory support;
- sponsored development;
- compliance review;
- enterprise support;
- co-development of generative psychometric infrastructure.

Commercial licensing inquiries should be directed to the copyright holders.
